title: Zendesk Says AI Makes Code Abundant, Shifting the Bottleneck to “Absorption Capacity”
summary: Zendesk argues that GenAI shifts the bottleneck in software delivery from writing code to “absorption capacity”, which is the organisation’s ability to define problems clearly, integrate changes into the wider system, and turn implementation into reliable value.
